name: build_phase3_renderer
outcome_goal: Build the React app shell that renders app manifests from Postgres

jobs.label: build_react_shell
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis. Postgres at postgresql://nate@127.0.0.1:5432/dag_workflow.

Create a React + Vite + TypeScript app at: Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/

This is the frontend shell for the self-configuring app builder. It renders app manifests stored in Postgres.

Scaffold with:
- Vite 5 + React 18 + TypeScript
- vite.config.ts proxying /api/* to http://127.0.0.1:8420
- Dark theme (bg: #0d1117, card: #161b22, accent: #58a6ff, text: #c9d1d9)

Create these files:

1. src/world.ts — Reactive store (port pattern from /Users/nate/Builds/apps/dynamic_ui_shell/src/world.js as reference). Path-based subscriptions, delta updates, committed + proposed layers.

2. src/primitives/registry.ts — Component registry. Maps string IDs to React components. resolve(id) -> Component.

3. src/primitives/PrimitiveRenderer.tsx — Takes a manifest node descriptor, resolves component from registry, subscribes to World path if specified, renders.

4. src/primitives/SlotLayout.tsx — Layout manager with header/grid/footer slots. Reads layout from manifest.

5. src/primitives/ — Implement these 10 seed primitives:
   - MetricCard.tsx (value + label + optional trend)
   - DataTable.tsx (columns from props, rows from World path, sortable)
   - TextBox.tsx (input field, emits onChange)
   - Button.tsx (label, onClick dispatches action)
   - Dropdown.tsx (options from props or World path, emits onChange)
   - ChartView.tsx (bar/line/pie from data in World path — use recharts)
   - Panel.tsx (collapsible card container)
   - IconDisplay.tsx (icon name -> rendered icon)
   - TextDisplay.tsx (rich text / markdown rendering)
   - Box.tsx (generic container with configurable padding/border)

6. src/hooks/useSlice.ts — Subscribe to a World path, return value, auto-rerender on change.

7. src/hooks/useApi.ts — Fetch wrapper for /api/* endpoints.

8. src/App.tsx — Load manifest from /api/manifests/:id, feed into SlotLayout + PrimitiveRenderer.

9. src/styles/tokens.css — CSS custom properties for the design system.

10. package.json with dependencies: react, react-dom, recharts, vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, typescript.

Do NOT use any packages beyond these. Keep it minimal.

Also update .claude/launch.json to add a 'dag-app' server config for the Vite dev server on port 5173.

Write all the files. Run npm install. Verify it builds with npm run build.
